headline: Astryx coverage build (#76) COMPLETE on claude/design-system-build-plan-xrj5qm — all tiers shipped and green across 6 commits: 14 Tier-1 (9 native + 5 Radix skins), 3 promotions, 12 Tier-2 patterns, 5 Tier-3 date/time components (react-day-picker v10 + date-fns per ADR-020). 34 components total. 1108 vitest passing; every Lean-gate-set gate green (typecheck, lint --max-warnings=0, contrast, app build + size-limit, smoke:consumer, storybook). Awaiting review + merge.
next: Review + merge claude/design-system-build-plan-xrj5qm (6 commits; changesets aggregate to a single minor bump)

Optional follow-ups: add an Overlays doc page (unblocks @doc-exempt overlays incl. HdsAlertDialog/HdsHoverCard/HdsContextMenu/HdsMultiSelector), wire Figma Code Connect stubs, add visual-regression coverage for the date family
Monitor the virtual-hds-manifest size budget (now 42.7/46 kB) as more components land
